name: Naturepedia Carbon Cycle Map
description: Paid compressed relationship map connecting carbon movement through atmosphere, plants, soils, microbes, forests, water systems, decomposition, sequestration, climate feedbacks, and regenerative ecosystems.
architecture: Carbon Cycle → Photosynthesis → Respiration → Decomposition → Soil Carbon → Forest Carbon → Carbon Sequestration → Carbon & Microbial Life → Climate Carbon Feedbacks → Regenerative Carbon Systems

systemNodes.name: Photosynthesis
systemNodes.role: Carbon capture and plant energy conversion layer

systemNodes.name: Respiration
systemNodes.role: Carbon release and biological metabolism layer

systemNodes.name: Decomposition
systemNodes.role: Organic matter breakdown and microbial transformation layer

systemNodes.name: Soil Carbon Systems
systemNodes.role: Soil organic matter, roots, fungi, aggregates, and carbon stabilization layer

systemNodes.name: Forest Carbon Systems
systemNodes.role: Tree biomass, canopy, deadwood, roots, and forest storage layer

systemNodes.name: Carbon Sequestration
systemNodes.role: Long-term carbon capture, storage, and ecosystem retention layer

systemNodes.name: Carbon & Microbial Life
systemNodes.role: Microbial transformation, decomposition, respiration, and carbon cycling layer

systemNodes.name: Climate Carbon Feedbacks
systemNodes.role: Carbon-climate interaction, warming feedbacks, and atmospheric regulation layer

systemNodes.name: Regenerative Carbon Systems
systemNodes.role: Applied restoration, farming, soil rebuilding, biodiversity, and carbon resilience layer
